# Xbox Wire

- **Source ID:** `xbox-wire`
- **Category:** official
- **Feed URL:** `https://news.xbox.com/en-us/feed/`
- **Homepage:** https://news.xbox.com
- **Source Weight:** 0.95

## Notes

Official Microsoft/Xbox channel. Treated as an `official` source — mentions count toward `official_mentions_72h` in the trending formula, which boosts trending scores by 10× per mention.
Content includes Xbox Game Pass additions, Xbox Showcase announcements, first-party game updates, and hardware news.
